About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa‚Äã #FutureNostalgia‚Äã #Grammys

snippet.title: Zack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League | Official Trailer #2 | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman‚Äôs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Be the first to know more:

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal vs Tottenham Hotspur (2-1) | Premier League | Odegaard, Lacazette
snippet.description:
We came from a goal behind to deservedly win a dramatic north London derby.
It was no less than we deserved after a largely dominant performance, but we had to dig deep after Erik Lamela gave the visitors the lead.

Martin Odegaard levelled up before the break and captain for the day Alexandre Lacazette scored the winner from the penalty spot.

There were some late nervy moments - despite playing the last 15 minutes with an extra man after Lamela's red card - but we held on for a well-deserved confidence boosting win.

There's no doubt we made most of the early running, and we certainly were looking positive in possession, trying to mov the ball forward through the organised Tottenham rearguard.

Despite seeing plenty of the ball though, we didn't have a clear sight at goal until Emile Smith Rowe rattled the crossbar with a fine attempt from 20 yards. Hugo Lloris was well beaten in the visitors' goal, but the ball bounced away to safety.

Smith Rowe was the architect of our next chance, cutting the ball back from the byline to the lurking Alexandre Lacazette, but the Frenchman screwed his shot wide from six yards after attempting to open up his body and shoot across goal.

But our dominance began to fade and we were punished on the half hour. Lamela - an early replacement for Heung-Min Son - showed great technique to score inside the far post.

The goal was very much against the run of play, but we kept pushing and hit the woodwork for a second time when Cedric latched onto a loose ball just inside the box and crashed his effort against the upright.

We deserved to be on terms, and finally drew level late in the half through Odegaard. Kieran Tierney got away down the left, sent in a low cross which the Norwegian steered beyond Lloris via a deflection off Toby Alderweireld.

It was his second goal in four days after opening his account in Greece on Thursday.

It would have been an injustice to go in behind at the interval, and we continued to dictate the play early in the second half.

Nicolas Pepe was introduced for Bukayo Saka at the break, and the Ivorian's wonderful pass to Lacazette inside the box resulted in a penalty. Lacazette failed to make good contact with his shot, but was cleaned out by Davinson Sanchez. Referee Michael Oliver pointed to the spot and Lacazette himself dispatched.

Lamela saw red for an elbow on Tierney, but perversely the visitors improved after going down to ten men.

Harry Kane headed home a free-kick but was flagged offside as Spurs piled on the late pressure.

Kane then struck the post from a free-kick and Gabriel made a superb clearing header to keep out Sanchez's follow up strike.

It was nervy, but we held on for a thoroughly deserved victory.

#arsenal #arsenalhighlights #premierleague 

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

localized.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal vs Tottenham Hotspur (2-1) | Premier League | Odegaard, Lacazette
localized.description:
We came from a goal behind to deservedly win a dramatic north London derby.
It was no less than we deserved after a largely dominant performance, but we had to dig deep after Erik Lamela gave the visitors the lead.

Martin Odegaard levelled up before the break and captain for the day Alexandre Lacazette scored the winner from the penalty spot.

There were some late nervy moments - despite playing the last 15 minutes with an extra man after Lamela's red card - but we held on for a well-deserved confidence boosting win.

There's no doubt we made most of the early running, and we certainly were looking positive in possession, trying to mov the ball forward through the organised Tottenham rearguard.

Despite seeing plenty of the ball though, we didn't have a clear sight at goal until Emile Smith Rowe rattled the crossbar with a fine attempt from 20 yards. Hugo Lloris was well beaten in the visitors' goal, but the ball bounced away to safety.

Smith Rowe was the architect of our next chance, cutting the ball back from the byline to the lurking Alexandre Lacazette, but the Frenchman screwed his shot wide from six yards after attempting to open up his body and shoot across goal.

But our dominance began to fade and we were punished on the half hour. Lamela - an early replacement for Heung-Min Son - showed great technique to score inside the far post.

The goal was very much against the run of play, but we kept pushing and hit the woodwork for a second time when Cedric latched onto a loose ball just inside the box and crashed his effort against the upright.

We deserved to be on terms, and finally drew level late in the half through Odegaard. Kieran Tierney got away down the left, sent in a low cross which the Norwegian steered beyond Lloris via a deflection off Toby Alderweireld.

It was his second goal in four days after opening his account in Greece on Thursday.

It would have been an injustice to go in behind at the interval, and we continued to dictate the play early in the second half.

Nicolas Pepe was introduced for Bukayo Saka at the break, and the Ivorian's wonderful pass to Lacazette inside the box resulted in a penalty. Lacazette failed to make good contact with his shot, but was cleaned out by Davinson Sanchez. Referee Michael Oliver pointed to the spot and Lacazette himself dispatched.

Lamela saw red for an elbow on Tierney, but perversely the visitors improved after going down to ten men.

Harry Kane headed home a free-kick but was flagged offside as Spurs piled on the late pressure.

Kane then struck the post from a free-kick and Gabriel made a superb clearing header to keep out Sanchez's follow up strike.

It was nervy, but we held on for a thoroughly deserved victory.

#arsenal #arsenalhighlights #premierleague

snippet.title: TRITURADORA PUEDE MASTICAR VIDRIO BLINDADO
snippet.description:
¬°HOY vuelven los experimentos con mi trituradora! Vamos a hacer un crash test para ver que tanto resiste el vidrio blindado. He comprado vidrio de bancos para guardar dinero, es uno de los vidrios mas resistentes que hay. Vamos a hacer una prueba de fuerza, unos cuantos experimentos con vidrio blindado y se los mostraremos en camara lenta para que la diversion y el entretenimiento no tengan limites. Les mostrare mi reaccion a la trituradora y al vidrio blindado, veremos que resultados inesperados nos aguardan en estos videos divertidos. No te despegues del canal de los mejores experimentos, si te preguntas que hacer cuando estas aburrido, ya tienes la respuesta! Asi que vamos a experimentar

Los coloqu√© en un vidrio y espera a que las hormigas fellah llegaran y bebieran el sirop de colores. Resultados inesperados completamente: las hormigas cambian de color! Al beber el sirop de colores sus barrigas cambian de color, es una de las reacciones quimicas mas interesantes que he visto en mi vida, y por su puesto se los mostrar√© en camara lenta para que la diversion y el entretenimiento no tengan limite. snippet.title: ABRO LA OUIJA ROSA DE JUGUETE PROHIBIDA en 2010 | Curiosidades con Mike
snippet.description:
Mike muestra la pol√©mica tabla Ouija Rosa de juguete del a√±o 2010 solo para chicas. Esta Ouija de juguete ya no est√° disponible en tiendas, es un juguete retirado y un juguete prohibido en 2010. ý∏Ñý∏≥ý∏ßýπàý∏≤ýπÑý∏°ýπàý∏£ý∏±ý∏ÅýπÅý∏Ñýπàý∏ûý∏πý∏îýπÄý∏öý∏≤ ýπÜ ý∏Åýπáý∏üý∏±ý∏áýπÅý∏óý∏öýπÑý∏°ýπàýπÑý∏´ý∏ß ý∏àý∏≤ý∏Åý∏ôý∏µýπâý∏Ñý∏áýπÑý∏°ýπàýπÄý∏´ý∏•ý∏∑ý∏≠ý∏≠ý∏∞ýπÑý∏£ ýπÑý∏°ýπàý∏£ý∏πýπâý∏ßýπàý∏≤ý∏ßý∏±ý∏ôýπÑý∏´ý∏ôý∏àý∏∞ý∏•ý∏∑ý∏°

snippet.title: El perro callejero que entr√≥ solo a una veterinaria para que lo atiendan y emociona a todos
snippet.description:
El video de un perro callejero que lleg√≥ y entr√≥ solo a una veterinaria para que lo atiendan causa emoci√≥n. Ocurri√≥ en Juazeiro do Norte, ciudad del Estado de Cear√°, en Brasil.
El cachorro ten√≠a una de sus patas lastimadas por un clavo y entr√≥ visiblemente dolorido. Adem√°s ten√≠a un sangrado en la zona genital.
El animal entr√≥ solo como si fuese un cliente y durante los primeros segundos los veterinarios parec√≠an no entender la situaci√≥n. Sin embargo, cuando observaron que no se encontraba en buenas condiciones, comenzaron a atenderlo.
‚ÄúLleg√≥ y mostr√≥ su pata‚Äù, asegur√≥ la veterinaria que lo asisti√≥ primero. Durante los estudios descubrieron que el perro tiene un tumor ven√©reo y por lo tanto deber√° someterse a un tratamiento que incluye quimioterapia durante al menos 30 d√≠as.
El emocionante video fue dado a conocer por el sitio Di√°rio Do Nordeste. ‚ÄúLleg√≥ tranquilo, mostr√≥ su pata y fui para ver qu√© pasaba. Me di cuenta de que ten√≠a sangrado en la regi√≥n genital. Pero hab√≠a un problema mucho mayor que s√≥lo diagnosticamos m√°s tarde: tiene un tumor ven√©reo transmisible (TVT). Adem√°s ten√≠a una lesi√≥n en la pata provocada por un clavo‚Äù, dijo la profesional encargada del centro veterinario.
Dayse Silva, que fue quien recibi√≥ al cachorro, cont√≥ adem√°s que probablemente el perro lleg√≥ ah√≠ por sentir el olor de las otras mascotas que estaban dentro del local.
Las im√°genes no paran de compartirse y ahora hay una larga lista de personas que quieren adoptar al perro callejero. Cientos se ofrecen por las redes sociales, mientras que otros fueron de manera presencial a la veterinaria.

¬°Somos El Doce! Seguinos en Instagram: 
https://www.instagram.com/eldocetv/‚Äã

Join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/GYr8YfNnck

Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Shredder‚Äôs Revenge will be available on PC and consoles. 

Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Shredder‚Äôs Revenge reunites Leonardo, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Donatello to kick shell in a beautifully realized pixel art world invoking the turtles‚Äô classic 1987 design.

With Bebop and Rocksteady amassing gizmos to support Krang and Shredder‚Äôs latest scheme, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Shredder‚Äôs Revenge finds the turtles battling through a breathless tour of iconic TMNT locations to thwart their nemeses‚Äô most diabolical plan yet. Armed with shell-shocking new abilities built on a foundation of classic brawling mechanics, the gang are in for an exhilarating, Foot Clan-stomping romp leading them through the sewers and bustling boroughs of New York City all the way to Dimension X.

Trailer directed by Gary Levesque and produced by Wizz (Quadgroup)

es-419.description:
SCP-343 es una anomal√≠a de Clase Segura tambi√©n conocida como Dios.

SCP-343 es un hombre, aparentemente sin raza, de apariencia humanoide con aparente omnipotencia. SCP 343 fue descubierto caminando por las calles de Praga y detenido despu√©s de que un miembro del personal lo viera desaparecer de las calles y reaparecer en un tejado. SCP343 est√° detenido por voluntad propia en su c√°mara, ya que la contenci√≥n ha resultado imposible.

Por favor, d√≠ganos en los comentarios qu√© SCP deber√≠amos tratar a continuaci√≥n

Entre 2019 y 2020, Londres tuvo la mayor p√©rdida de poblaci√≥n desde la Segunda Guerra Mundial. Este declive sin precedentes en tiempos de paz estuvo impulsado por un √©xodo masivo de migrantes, que tuvo su epicentro en Londres y que est√° relacionado con el Brexit y con la pandemia de covid-19. 

Cerca de 1,3 millones de extranjeros se fueron de Reino Unido entre el tercer trimestre de 2019 y el mismo periodo de 2020, seg√∫n datos del Centro de Excelencia de Estad√≠stica Econ√≥mica (ESCOE) de Reino Unido. 

De esa cifra, m√°s de la mitad, unas 700.000 personas, se fueron de Londres, tradicionalmente una de las ciudades m√°s bulliciosas y atractivas del mundo. En este video Inma Gil explica qu√© hay detr√°s de este √©xodo masivo reciente.

En alg√∫n episodio anterior, les compart√≠ mi an√©cdota sobre una agradable se√±ora que se ofreci√≥ a hacerme un masaje en las calles de Caracas... Al terminar, intent√© pagarle al rededor de 5 d√≥lares y ella, de una manera muy honrada y humilde, me dijo que solo le diera un d√≥lar y al final eso fue lo que le pagu√©.

Esto provoc√≥ algunas opiniones encontradas en los comentarios del video, algunos resaltaban el buen gesto y honestidad de la se√±ora, pero tambi√©n algunos me tacharon que taca√±o y ego√≠sta por no haber insistido en darle m√°s dinero... Y aunque puedo asegurarles que en ese momento yo s√≠ quer√≠a darle m√°s que solo un d√≥lar... En este video les platicar√© sobre la absurda y complicada econom√≠a que vive Venezuela en la actualidad incluso para los turistas y el motivo por el cual en ESE momento, tuve que aceptar su oferta de pagarle solo un d√≥lar por ese masaje.

Pero antes de llegar a eso, me gustar√≠a terminar de explicarte los √∫ltimos a√±os de la vida de Hugo Ch√°vez y una breve explicaci√≥n sobre el gobierno del actual presidente Nicol√°s Maduro, para que puedas comprender por qu√© utilizar el dinero en Venezuela ahora es tan complicado.

snippet.title: Open Beta - Americas | League of Legends: Wild Rift
snippet.description:
Here we go! Wild Rift's Open Beta comes to the Americas on March 29th.

Pre-register for Wild Rift today:
Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.riotgames.league.wildrift
Samsung Store: https://apps.samsung.com/appquery/preOrderDetail.as?contentId=000005383176
iOS App Store available on March 29th.

ABOUT THE GAME
Dive into Wild Rift: the skills-and-strats 5v5 MOBA experience of League of Legends, now built from the ground up for mobile (and coming soon to console). With fresh controls and fast-paced games, players of every level can team up with friends, lock in their champion, and go for the big plays. 

Learn more at https://wildrift.leagueoflegends.com.

Follow for 200IQ gameplay clips, dev and feature updates, and a whole lot more:
Instagram: https://instagram.com/playwildrift  
Facebook: https://facebook.com/playwildrift  
Twitter: https://twitter.com/wildrift 
Website: https://wildrift.leagueoflegends.com
